base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of iggy_larry — a character (boss) from 1990 super mario world. Iggy + Larry Koopalings (World 1 + 7 castle bosses. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Iggy + Larry Koopalings (World 1 + 7 castle bosses; Iggy the baby / Larry the youngest)
